### Children's guardian, solicitor and reports under section 7 of the 1989 Act E+W


12.6. [ F46 Within a day of the issue of Part 4 proceedings or the transfer of Part 4 Proceedings to the court and as ] soon as practicable after the issue of [ F47 other ] proceedings or the transfer of the [ F48 other ] proceedings to the court, the court will—


(Part 16 sets out the rules relating to representation of children.)


Textual Amendments

### What a court officer will do E+W


12.7. —(1) As soon as practicable after the issue of proceedings the court officer will return to the applicant the copies of the application together with the forms referred to in Practice Direction 5A.

metadata.title: Part 12 — Children Proceedings except Parental Order Proceedings and Proceedings for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings
